name: db_query_tool
description: Search arcade shops by keyword and region. Use *_code for 12-digit region codes, or *_name for natural-language region names. Can also fetch one shop by shop_id. Supports sorting via sort_by/sort_order/sort_title_name, including distance sorting from an origin longitude/latitude. For named-place nearby search, resolve the place with AMap MCP first, then pass the resolved coordinates as origin_*.

keyword.description: Search keyword, e.g. `maimai` or `广州 maimai`.
keyword.title: Keyword

province_name.description: Province name when code is unavailable, e.g. `广东`.
province_name.title: Province Name

city_name.description: City name when code is unavailable, e.g. `广州`.
city_name.title: City Name

county_name.description: County/district name when code is unavailable.
county_name.title: County Name

has_arcades.description: Whether to require rows containing at least one title.
has_arcades.title: Has Arcades

sort_by.description: Sort field. `distance` sorts by straight-line distance from `origin_lng`/`origin_lat`; use `sort_order=asc` for nearest first. `title_quantity` sorts by machine `quantity`(qty) for one title; `arcade_count` sorts by number of distinct title entries in one shop. Use `default` to keep built-in deterministic order.
sort_by.title: Sort By

sort_title_name.description: When `sort_by=title_quantity`, provide title name, e.g. `maimai` or `sdvx`.
sort_title_name.title: Sort Title Name

origin_lng.description: Origin longitude used when `sort_by=distance`. Browser geolocation should pass WGS84 longitude; AMap MCP geocode/place-search results usually pass GCJ-02 longitude.
origin_lng.title: Origin Longitude

origin_lat.description: Origin latitude used when `sort_by=distance`. Browser geolocation should pass WGS84 latitude; AMap MCP geocode/place-search results usually pass GCJ-02 latitude.
origin_lat.title: Origin Latitude

origin_coord_system.description: Coordinate system for origin_lng/origin_lat. Use `wgs84` for browser geolocation; use `gcj02` for AMap MCP/REST coordinates unless the tool explicitly says otherwise.
origin_coord_system.title: Origin Coordinate System
